features.featureTitle: Update the Location component to display named studio entries: 'Studio Belvedere' as the name for Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria; 'Clinicus Natura' as the name for Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal; and 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request' as a third unlabelled entry (no studio name). Each named entry should display the studio name prominently above its address.
